body:
To quote Rachel Maddow, the DSCC just launched a "gut punch of an ad" on health care. We're going after every Republican who thinks they can get away with a health care price hike.
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fight-wealthcare-watch?refcode=DPE-20170322-Rapid_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Friend --

To quote Rachel Maddow: the DSCC just launched a "gut punch of an ad" on health care.

That's right. We're going after every Republican who thinks they can get away with a health care price hike. And we need your help to make sure every swing-state voter knows what the GOP's health care plan will cost them.

[**Watch our new ad and then pitch in $1 to keep this hard-hitting campaign going.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fight-wealthcare-watch?refcode=DPE-20170322-Rapid_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

| [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fight-wealthcare-watch?refcode=DPE-20170322-Rapid_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---

Everyone from Maddow to _Politico_ to _The Hill_ is talking about this ad, but our goal is to do more than generate some headlines. We're making sure every member of the GOP has to answer for Trumpcare. In fact, we've even included state-by-state information on what the Republican plan costs American families.

But in order to make sure we have that type of reach (_before a health care repeal bill lands in the Senate_) we need to make sure every senator knows that Donald Trump can't protect them -- and that they'll have to answer to the families whose health care they are trying to strip away.

[**Help us get the job done, friend. Pitch in now to help us keep this aggressive ad campaign going -- and deliver a real gut-punch to the GOP.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fight-wealthcare-watch?refcode=DPE-20170322-Rapid_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

With your help, we can make sure every Republican Senator feels the heat on health care.

Thanks for standing with us,

Team DSCC

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Congress Needs Godly Wisdom
body:
Don't miss this opportunity to give them the answers!

View this email in your browser

Dear Peter,

There is division in our nation. Anger.
Distrust. Discord. All you need to do is turn on the TV or spend
less than two minutes on Facebook and you see it.

The fact is, today's problems are complex -
and there aren't simple solutions. And more importantly, the
solutions coming out of Washington aren't founded on godly wisdom
any more.

That's why My Faith Votes has launched an
initiative to give the gift of wisdom to our elected officials.
Our goal is, with you, to give a Bible to every senator and
representative in Congress!

The Bible we'll send them is the American
Patriot's Bible, which lays out the biblical truths that formed
the foundation of American values and examines the intersection
of American history and the Christian faith.

If we can encourage our elected officials to
read the bible, our nation will surely flourish!

We need your help to make this happen.

Join me in placing the wisdom of God in the
hands of Congress and, once again, bringing the Judeo-Christian
values upon which this country was founded back into focus!

Give a bible to your Congressmen today.

Thank you!

Jason Yates
Chief Executive Officer
My Faith Votes

name: The White House
subject: Your 1600 Daily: President Trump meets with Women in Healthcare panel and Congressional Black Caucus members, Judge Gorsuch confirmation hearing continues
body:
Everything White House for 3/23/2017. |

**WHITE HOUSE MEMO**
On the 7th anniversary of former President Obama signing the disaster known as Obamacare, President Donald J. Trump is working hard to secure the votes to repeal and replace this failed law with a better system that will drive down costs and increase choice for all Americans.

**MORNING:**
* **11:30AM** : President Trump meets with House Freedom Caucus members

**AFTERNOON:**
* **3:25PM** : President Trump leads a listening session with truckers and CEOs regarding healthcare

**GET INVOLVED**
Obamacare has hurt millions. Now is the time to repeal and replace it. Call your Representative and let them know you are behind #AHCA!
[Find Your Representative Here](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3739b49982e0f1cc29bb728bc20152cb992c8ee60b08f23b11129709eaab111561225aeccbbc1ae6fa6301ee2ab334a6100e7b12278a1124)

name: Alex Vogel
subject: I am so proud of my wife
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186
body:
---
| | | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cZ8zp5w1-zl2blWwhXnyc5_63H6mqeLPVQilODeInNOkkM_xKReCAxZx8zvCyYU9slrp9CyNAFrqe3J0kKquVux95244bSmv06iU0ANjtMNSbhsZ2pBrHPamlFqCuL13wggGbbW6zZ0tzcM_xfBmSZNt1j3uqQmOINT_JJCwqIYyxpGglgmrtYGumRoe5pxKZ6scPd2dStE5AE8W32hQk8kTEiC43bRB7cs55VmMWmrFZJKulVDLEnKDdoLDVcsnyVapcbXnMPQ=&c=pXesQZ3ci3rN8iu-dJqX4CelDaZ2rG8IjeEim0hxAzxoUBC7NCflCQ==&ch=60bgaf6W4xFtzCdLtVUpgGGdEBOLlxPji0zCGWfh-zHCLfrLV8_tSQ==)
---
| | |
---
| Peter,
I'm thrilled to be standing beside my wife, Jill Vogel, as she runs for lieutenant governor.

I knew when Jill first considered running that a successful campaign would keep her busy and on the road.

However, understanding the challenges facing Virginia's families today, I know she is the person to step forward and be the leader Virginia needs now and the kids and I are proud of her.

Jill and I chose to stay in Virginia, where Jill was born and raised, and to start our family here because of the great opportunities and excellent quality of life. We wanted our children to grow up close to their family and learn the values which would build character to last a lifetime.

Jill cared as much about the future then as she does today. She knows we need new, smarter policies in Richmond so that our children's generation is able to share the same opportunities we had.

Jill knows we need to roll back regulations, lower taxes for every Virginian, and remain loyal to our Constitution.

Jill is also just a truly good person who has always gone out of her way to help everyone. That has made her a great public servant. No task is too big to take on and certainly none is too tedious or small either. The kids and I sure hate the tedious ones sometimes, but she has been a great example to our children of what responsibility, work ethic and standing up for what is right is all about. I could not be more proud of her for standing up to provide the type of transformative leadership we need.

Admittedly, I might be a bit biased.

For seventeen years, I have come to know Jill as the best friend, wife, and mother anyone could ask for and in that time thousands of Virginians have also come to know Jill as a leader they can count on.

Please join me in supporting Jill in June 13th's Republican primary, so that all Virginians may come to know her as Virginia's most successful lieutenant governor.

I have a favor to ask - would you [send Jill a small contribution of $25 or even $10](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cZ8zp5w1-zl2blWwhXnyc5_63H6mqeLPVQilODeInNOkkM_xKReCA6TGlPd4sIaG8jcae935ethhoUet_gLUcddhvVVP78IQTBGTARRrQ3uc7CStU0YElZvR9-TbsbpguNg2r-KlwzQZKXssJn8lxy2-V--EJBg8eau5l4iQgPR9ck9dvqC6rH8_Nrva22yZHtgcdUSskFQ85PchvrCcQs_pOivHPUVV0vXLObMd1YHKjkZDMFnBxpzqhPCAHz3JlPF7VO1e0r4=&c=pXesQZ3ci3rN8iu-dJqX4CelDaZ2rG8IjeEim0hxAzxoUBC7NCflCQ==&ch=60bgaf6W4xFtzCdLtVUpgGGdEBOLlxPji0zCGWfh-zHCLfrLV8_tSQ==) to let her know she can count on your support?

When she comes home this weekend after a long week on the campaign trail, I hope to share a big list of supporters with her.

Thank you,
---
|
---
|

---
| Alex Vogel

subject: Join us on the Road to Repeal
body:
| | [Web Version](http://view.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=985057d84f3794ed36f822f176f1745df3d59390a2fc281867673ed580318432217e6d10e2c3efb34fb48014abdb45815b1f8c3da98935567a0cfe38405fd4891a731e72c46d5b23)

---
| | Peter,

From 2009 all the way to today, Americans for Prosperity has dedicated major resources to opposing Obamacare and getting relief for every American. Finally, we have a political environment where full repeal is possible so that we can move on to getting true, patient-centered reforms that make insurance more affordable for all. Our organization and our 3.2 million grassroots volunteers made a commitment long ago that we would never let up the fight, no matter how long it took. We've kept that promise; now it's time for Congress to keep theirs!
[Unfortunately, the current plan working its way through the House of Representatives is not a full repeal of Obamacare](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=af138346b07d9cd32787bffe649c817a0c89d83f9a13311afb5b286e950434ed751ff31958a43cf83a6468b862f5d7c4e2a57de22b6a6a8c "Unfortunately, the current plan working its way through the House of Representatives is not a full repeal of Obamacare"). In fact, it keeps many of harmful policies that have been making health care much too costly all along.
In short, we cannot support the plan: it simply swaps out Obamacare with a new federal entitlement. [So, we're going to do what we do best ](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=af138346b07d9cd36f4f86e9b4eebfa3b19daa9aa94fbddfded38f3c3a6de414c6fc349bf0690a7aad85c473bdfcefb6d87b0d82387a3d5e "So, we're going to do what we do best"). We're going to stand with champions of freedom who oppose this bill, and we're going to hold other members accountable if they support more Obamacare in another form.
**That's why we're launching a new website,[RoadtoRepeal.org](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=af138346b07d9cd3f8890d5f46005595aa34cf8fa2e0f6f486ca60d6e367122f5ecc51d1b8b1a7253e7835334bf1ce211189248b7c3e72d1 "RoadtoRepeal.org"), filled with all the incredible grassroots outpouring we've had in the past**. That kind of action has taken us all the way to the precipice of repeal, and it will remind politicians and the public what it looks like when Americans for Prosperity brings the full force of its grassroots leaders to bear on an issue. If we need to, we'll do it again!

[](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=af138346b07d9cd3f658e43babcfe6addea4847676164f7b3e88e7c0e7ecc389bad918f19265dcef71672ec81a50fa795d38b590920c5651)
[Take a look at all of the incredible progress we've made ](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=af138346b07d9cd38628d4e4dec17ba0a076238c3d5a3fc3fc1fc23d5ce270241a23a0f62ac4c7b3998de5c7da02b52e14d86134ebb5fe8d "Take a look at all of the incredible progress we've made")\- sharing personal stories about government-run care, airing TV ads to let the public know where lawmakers stand, and most importantly, rallying for the cause all across the country, year after year. It's an incredible effort to be proud of. Take stock, and share this with your friends and neighbors.
The fight isn't over yet, but we're determined to get meaningful repeal and work to get affordability for all.
Much lies ahead,
Tim PhillipsPresident Americans for Prosperity
_P.S. You can[click here](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=af138346b07d9cd3e6ba7a86417066ae1733fd325b0657dfc4c71aa52dc5a088b093c2e1d063f53d27e2be1b05af533515ff17351b166295 "click here") to remind your lawmaker that you're watching this vote carefully, and want them to oppose the House plan to alter Obamacare. Ask them for a full repeal, and remind them they promised!_

body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- This can't wait, friends.

Later today the House is set to vote on Trumpcare. Donald Trump and the GOP have made it their mission to pass this legislation. And that's why we've got to stand together and defend the Affordable Care Act.

**[Please, click here and add your name and help Florida Democrats fight to defend the Affordable Care Act.](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b249/1a5213b3/76e34743/718baba0/1964581480/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIn0=/ "http://act.floridadems.org/acas1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223")**

Seven years ago, the ACA was signed into law and since then, we've made a lot of progress.
* Over 20 million Americans received health insurance because of the ACA.
* Young people are able to stay on their parents' plan longer.
* Americans who used to not be able to get insurance are now guaranteed coverage.

We've made far too much progress to go back. That is why with the GOP set to vote on their replacement to the ACA, it's critical that we send the strongest message possible that we're standing up and defending the ACA.

**[Please click here and instantly add your name to stand up and defend the ACA against the GOP's attempts to undo the progress we've made.](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b249/1a5213b3/76e34743/718baba0/1964581480/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIn0=/ "http://act.floridadems.org/acas1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223")**

Thanks for all you do,

name: Russ Feingold
subject: A devastating threat
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
The GOP's judicial coup spat in the face of our Constitution, and a nomination that locks that in cannot be accepted. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46a1/1c469400/28999de/3547d00/332662854/VEsH/ "http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/s/oppose-the-gorsuch-confirmation?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20170323_r4w_gorsuch1_optin&source=20170323_r4w_gorsuch1_optin") Friend -- Today, right now, our democracy is facing a devastating threat. And it's not only Russia. Republicans are attempting to complete the cynical political takeover of the Supreme Court that they launched last year when they failed to even give a hearing to Judge Merrick Garland. **The legitimacy of the Supreme Court has already taken a severe blow because of the GOP's political games, but if Judge Gorsuch is confirmed, it would lock in a dangerous precedent from which the legitimacy of our highest court may not recover.** The Senate is the only entity now able to prevent this precedent and its resulting slippery slope, but only if senators are willing to fight. Democratic and Independent senators, and any Republicans who still care about the legitimacy of the Supreme Court, must filibuster Gorsuch's nomination. [_**Sign LegitAction's petition to Democratic and Independent senators now: preserve the legitimacy of the Supreme Court by filibustering the confirmation of Judge Gorsuch.**_](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46a1/1c469400/28999de/3547d01/332662854/VEsE/ "http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/s/oppose-the-gorsuch-confirmation?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=2+-+Sign+LegitActions+petition+to+Democratic&utm_campaign=20170323_r4w_gorsuch1_optin&source=20170323_r4w_gorsuch1_optin") The legitimacy of the Supreme Court is one of the four key pillars of our country's democracy that is under threat and must be protected. The others are elections determined by voters instead of money, the unrestricted right and access to vote, and protecting the power of the popular vote. This time, the GOP took the Supreme Court hostage in the last year of a president's term; next it will be the year before midterm elections. It won't be long before it extends to the whole two-year presidential campaign, amounting to three years of any presidential term where a Supreme Court seat cannot be filled. I have always considered the Supreme Court our country's safety valve. When everything else fails, the Court is there to protect the Constitution and protect our civil rights. But today, the most important safety valve is the U.S. Senate, specifically those senators with the conviction to fight for the legitimacy of the Supreme Court. _[**That's why we're going to actually deliver the signatures from this petition to Democratic and Independent senators. Add your voice now and tell Democrats and Independents in the Senate to filibuster Judge Gorsuch.**](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46a1/1c469400/28999de/3547d3e/332662854/VEsF/ "http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/s/oppose-the-gorsuch-confirmation?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=3+-+Thats+why+were+going+to+actually+deliver&utm_campaign=20170323_r4w_gorsuch1_optin&source=20170323_r4w_gorsuch1_optin")_ The GOP's judicial coup spat in the face of our Constitution, and a nomination that locks that in as a precedent cannot be accepted under any circumstances. It is not hypocritical to try to right this wrong. It would be unconstitutional not to. Thanks for all you're doing during this crucial time. Sincerely, Russ | [TAKE ACTION»](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46a1/1c469400/28999de/3547d3f/332662854/VEsC/ "http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/s/oppose-the-gorsuch-confirmation?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=4+-+TAKE+ACTIONraquo&utm_campaign=20170323_r4w_gorsuch1_optin&source=20170323_r4w_gorsuch1_optin")

name: Nico Serra via OurRevolution.com
subject: Repealing ACA hurts people like me
body:
My life, mind and mobility were saved by this care.
#
Sisters and Brothers,
Seven years ago today, President Obama signed the Patient Protection and Affordable Care Act into law. I didn't know it at the time, but the ACA would have a profound impact on my life.
Less than a month after the ACA passed and about six weeks after I moved from Utah to Oregon, I was hit by a car while riding my bike. I lost my ability to hike, rock climb, white water raft, mountain bike and play softball. After working as a wilderness guide in Utah, it was difficult knowing that I wouldn't be able to enjoy Mount Hood or the Pacific Ocean like I had hoped. But the ACA's Medicaid expansion allowed me to have regular checkups with my doctor for the first time, and I was able to get treatment for a congenital disease that, combined with my traumatic injuries, had left me unable to walk or perform many functions of daily living. My life, mind and mobility were saved by this care.
Everyone should have health care like I received from the ACA, no matter their race, age, sexuality, ability, gender identity, religious belief or income. **[Will you donate $5 to support Our Revolution's fight for a single-payer, Medicare-for-all health care system?](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a4b/43f17890/dedb0e68/6203f6da/3221165479/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/or-healthcare?refcode=em170323-story-all")**
The Republican bill will cap and cut Medicaid by $880 Billion from the people who need it most - people with children, substance abuse problems, in need of mental health care or who have a disability like me. After coming out as transgender to my family, I lost the support system that had protected me, but thanks to Medicaid and my diagnosis I successfully applied for Social Security Disability Insurance. I don't know where I would be without it.
Our Revolution shares my belief that America should guarantee health care as a human right. We lag behind the major industrialized countries of the world in failing to grant this right to our citizens, and with the majority of Americans supporting universal coverage, there has never been more momentum to bring about such a needed change.
**[Donate $5 to Our Revolution today so that we can show the support that single-payer health care has all across America.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a4b/43f17890/dedb0e68/6203f6da/3221165479/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/or-healthcare?refcode=em170323-story-all")**
In solidarity,
Nico Serra
